## Summary

Describe the user-facing or operational change and its scope.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant type checks, linting, and tests pass.
- [ ] Loading, error, and empty states were considered where applicable.
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, generated caches, or local environment files are included.

## Documentation

- [ ] I updated [[Current State]] for a meaningful implementation-status change.
- [ ] I updated [[Architecture]] for a service, data-flow, deployment, or integration change.
- [ ] I updated [[Decisions]] for a durable architectural or product decision.
- [ ] I updated [[Known Issues]] for a newly discovered limitation or risk.
- [ ] I updated relevant API, product, accuracy, privacy, or deployment documentation.
- [ ] Documentation is intentionally unchanged because: <!-- explain when applicable -->

## Release Notes

- [ ] This change needs deployment configuration, a migration, an EAS build, or operator follow-up.
- [ ] This change is safe for the current preview environment without external setup.
